name: Edge Case Tests
description: Edge-case tests for abnormal input and extreme scenarios

testCases.name: Long Input Message
messages: I have a very detailed question about clinical trials. My mother is 72 years old, she was diagnosed with mild Alzheimer's disease about 6 months ago. She is currently taking donepezil 10mg daily and memantine 20mg daily. She has a history of hypertension controlled with lisinopril, type 2 diabetes managed with metformin, and mild osteoarthritis. She lives with me and my family, and I am her primary caregiver. We are located in the San Francisco Bay Area. She is generally in good health otherwise, can perform most daily activities with some assistance, and her MMSE score was 22 at her last visit. We are very interested in finding clinical trials that might help slow the progression of her condition. Can you help us find suitable trials and explain what the participation process would involve?

testCases.name: Topic Switching
testCases.description: Test context handling during topic switching
messages: Tell me about Alzheimer's clinical trials.
Actually, what's the weather like today?
Going back to clinical trials, what were we discussing?

testCases.name: Repeated Questions
messages: You already answered that, can you give me a different perspective?
